eigenstates: 20 percent of single-particle eigenstates in the middle of the spectrum
model: 3D Anderson model with open boundary conditions
purpose: Recommended paper-scale rerun for complete reproduction.

recommended_compute.memory: 128GB+ for L<=28 exact/sparse workflows; 256GB+ or cluster for L=38 workflows
recommended_compute.method: sparse shift-invert or block eigensolver around E=0; avoid full dense diagonalization at paper sizes
recommended_compute.runtime: multi-day batch queue for full figure set
